recommendations: LinkedIn User “Jo is the ultimate teammate. I had the pleasure of working with her at DoorDash for 9 months, collaborating on several Grocery/Retail products. Her ability to juggle multiple projects was unlike any I've seen before and had a sizable impact on our team's productivity. Jo's attitude and practical approach to solving problems encouraged everyone around her to work harder and forced them to think of the "big picture." I would trust Jo to solve any and all problems thrown at her. ”

Aneesha Prakash “From the moment I met Jo, I was inspired. She is one of the most organized, passionate, detail-oriented, positive PMs I’ve met with a strong bias for action. To lead product for a new vertical is no easy task and Jo has flourished. With a combination of well-structured spreadsheets, strong execution, and deep user empathy, she has made a significant impact to the DoorDash Drive team in just one year. Whether it’s creating a complex logistics feature from the ground up for our Retail partners, steering the company towards the Pharma vertical with a brand new platform, or planning one of the most memorable offsties in team history, she puts her 150% into everything she does, and that motivates those around her to do the same. No matter how full her calendar is, she will always make time to help her teammates through a jam. She views every curveball as a fun and interesting challenge. She will listen to and brainstorm with teammates, but can also direct them with a strong point of view that's data-driven and/or backed by a wide array of testimonials. It’s this combination that makes Jo someone you always want to rally behind. I’m super grateful to have had the chance to work alongside her this year. ”
